type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Please note that particulate releases are primarily soluble plant nutrients from a potash fertilizer facility. Calculations were completed using SRC generated potash industry estimates. The climate data that was used to calculate the road dust was taken from Environment Canada website for the Moose Jaw station. 

For the reduction in TPM for Road Dust, there was significantly less vehicle traffic on Mosaic's grid roads in 2019. There was a much lower amount of mining area projects requiring heavy equipment and trucks on site in 2019.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Please note that particulate releases are primarily soluble plant nutrients from a potash fertilizer facility. Calculations were completed using SRC generated potash industry estimates. type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Please note that particulate releases are primarily soluble plant nutrients from a potash fertilizer facility. Calculations were completed using SRC generated potash industry estimates. The climate data that was used to calculate the road dust was taken from Environment Canada website for the Moose Jaw station. 

The road dust value for 2019 was lower due to the fact that there was much less vehicle and heavy machinery traffic on Mosaic's mining area roads. This is mostly due to the lower amount of major capital projects at the time.
